title: Woodcutting
description: Stonecutting for Wood Blocks and Items!
body:
**Woodcutting!**
Stonecutting for Wood Blocks and Items! This is my take on the woodcutting concept. Simply place planks, logs, stems, or bamboo blocks into the stonecutter to easily create corresponding wood products! Adds stonecutter recipes and recipe toasts!

Each Planks (+ Bamboo Mosaics) can create: - 1 Stairs
- 2 Slabs
- 2 Fences
- 1 Fence Gate
- 1 Door
- 2 Trapdoors
- 8 Pressure Plates
- 9 Buttons
- 1 Ladder
- 1 Sign
- 2 Sticks
- 1 Bowl
Each Log/Wood/Stem/Hyphae (stripped or unstripped) can create: - 4 Planks
- 4 Stairs
- 8 Slabs
- 8 Fences
- 4 Fence Gates
- 4 Doors
- 8 Trapdoors
- 32 Pressure Plates
- 36 Buttons
- 1 Crafting Table
- 4 Ladders
- 2 Shelves
- 4 Signs
- 1 Boat (excluding Stems)
- 8 Sticks
- 4 Bowls
Each Bamboo Block (stripped or unstripped) can create: - 2 Stairs (Planks and Mosaic)
- 4 Slabs (Planks and Mosaic)
- 4 Fences
- 2 Fence Gates
- 2 Doors
- 4 Trapdoors
- 16 Pressure Plates
- 18 Buttons
- 2 Ladders
- 2 Shelves
- 2 Signs
- 4 Sticks
- 2 Bowls
Also, Logs/Wood blocks can be stripped in the stonecutter, and Bamboo Plank blocks/stairs/slabs can be converted to their Mosaic counterparts and vice versa! ## ### MintRefresh:
